description: v0.3.2 — canonical CONVERSATIONAL_CHANNELS list. Both Python (core.capability.CONVERSATIONAL_CHANNELS in perms_core.py) and Rust (makakoo_core::capability::CONVERSATIONAL_CHANNELS in capability/mod.rs) load this fixture in tests and assert their own set equals this list. Adding a plugin slug on one side without the other fails both suites in lockstep.
